title: Gayla Riemann

{{Quote|Capt. Antilles unavailable, sir. This is Lieutenant Riemann. May I help?|Gayla Riemann to [[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]]|<ref name="The Truce at Bakura">''[[The Truce at Bakura]]''</ref>}}
[[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] '''Gayla Riemann''' was a [[Gender/Legends|female]] [[Human/Legends|Human]] native of [[Aldraig IV]] who was an artist of interstellar renown before the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]] took a disliking to her art, forcing her to flee from her home and become a fugitive where she eventually joined the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Alliance to Restore the Republic]].

==History==
Riemann was a child prodigy in art, studying under the tutelage of some of the finest artist in the Empire. Growing tired of snobbishness of the [[Core Worlds/Legends|Core Worlds]], she returned to Aldraig IV. Upon her return, she discovered the picturesque countryside had been spoiled by the Imperial war machine as a [[All Terrain Armored Transport/Legends|AT-AT]] production facility had been built in several of the counties and the agricultural nature of the planet was changed to war production. She was particularly upset about a [[TIE series/Legends|TIE fighter]] hull assembly facility that was being constructed in the southern pole region of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. A [[Unidentified Aldraig IV bird|rare species]] of [[Bird/Legends|bird]] was located there and the construction threatened to lead to their extinction. Riemann arranged a peaceful protest in an attempt to save the birds, but it was broken up by the Imperial [[Governor/Legends|Governor]] [[Talloryn]] who had her arrested. She was informed that agitation was a capital offense, and released on probation. The artist began to secretly fund revolutionary activities. The local rebels managed to sabotage the TIE facility, but a captured operative was interrogated and revealed Riemann's involvement in the movement. She was arrested again and forced to produce [[Propaganda/Legends|propaganda]] for the Empire. One of her jobs was to create a series of paintings of the TIE facility to show the "beauty of Imperial progress". She used the opportunity to examine the plant and create a detailed schematic of the plant which she secretly provided to the underground forces on the planet. They used this knowledge to successfully destroyed the facility. She was then smuggled off the planet and joined the Rebel Alliance. She initially served as a supply pilot, ferrying goods to the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Rebel Fleet]]. Because of her natural piloting ability, she was promoted to [[Lieutenant/Legends|Lieutenant]] and trained as a [[Starfighter/Legends|starfighter]] [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]].<ref name="TBS" />

She eventually served as an [[T-65 X-wing starfighter/Legends|X-wing]] pilot and fought in the [[Battle of Endor/Legends|Battle of Endor]] and the [[Bakura Incident]]. After the conflict, she was tasked with training pilots for the [[Bakuran Defense Fleet]].<ref name="TBS" /> Riemann joined [[Rogue Squadron/Legends|Rogue Squadron]] at some point, and by [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]], she was considered a veteran of the group. In that [[Standard year/Legends|year]], she temporarily rejoined when [[Brevet]] [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Derek Klivian/Legends|Derek "Hobbie" Klivian]] and Lieutenant [[Wes Janson/Legends|Wes Janson]] formed an [[Ersatz Rogue Squadron|auxiliary Rogue Squadron]] during the [[Bacta War]]. She flew as part with this Rogue Squadron when [[Wedge Antilles/Legends|Wedge Antilles]] [[Antilles's Rogues|original Rogue Squadron]] returned to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]] for a celebration of the [[Battle of Thyferra|defeat]] of [[Ysanne Isard]].

==Personality and traits==
Riemann was highly skilled and determined. She opposed the Empire for their dedication to destroying beauty in the Galaxy.<ref name="TBS" />

==Equipment==
She typically wore a [[Flight suit/Legends|flight suit]] and carried a [[DL-18 Blaster Pistol]].<ref name="TBS" />
